news.title: Tokenization has become a strategic priority for 84% of financial firms
Newbie question
news.summary:
Hello and hope you're having a good day. I had Cardano on SecondFi and not thinking, entered my seed phrase there to check my account and everything looks fine. I went ahead and transferred everything to my Crypto.com wallet as I will be liquidating in the near future. My question is is my crypto still in danger since I entered my seed phrase in SecondFi? If so, how do I secure it at this point? Many thanks!

submitted by
